name: DEH Consulting Services LLC
description_short: DEH Consulting Services offers credit repair programs with monthly subscription plans ranging from $29.90–$39.90, plus business consulting, funding assistance, and bookkeeping services in Miami, Florida.
description_long:
DEH Consulting Services is a business and personal development consulting firm based in Miami, Florida, operating under the domain dunkleyestateco.com. The company positions itself as a comprehensive solutions provider for entrepreneurs and individuals seeking to improve their financial standing and business operations. Founded to serve both startup founders and established business owners, the firm emphasizes personalized guidance across multiple financial and operational domains.

The company's primary offerings include four tiered credit repair subscription plans (Growth, Advanced, Premium, and Elite) priced between $29.90 and $39.90 per month, designed to help clients dispute negative items and improve credit scores. Beyond credit repair, DEH Consulting Services provides business formation guidance, tax planning, QuickBooks bookkeeping support, business funding consultation, marketing services, and website development. The credit repair programs feature trial periods (most at $1.00 for 7 days), periodic reviews, dispute handling, and personalized recommendations depending on the tier selected.

DEH Consulting distinguishes itself by bundling credit repair with broader business development services rather than operating as a standalone credit repair shop. Customer testimonials highlight specific outcomes—one client reported a 120-point credit score increase within months, and another secured $45,000 in business funding after the company helped restructure their business and repair credit. The firm emphasizes educational components and hands-on support throughout the process, positioning credit repair as one element of a larger financial transformation strategy.

Key limitations include minimal transparency on dispute methodology, no published success rates or detailed cost breakdowns, and vague descriptions of what exactly is included in higher-tier plans. The company's website contains no regulatory disclosures, licensing information, or details on credentials of practitioners. Pricing is subscription-based with ongoing monthly charges rather than flat fees, and the trial conversion model suggests reliance on customer retention rather than upfront commitment. Prospective clients should verify credentials, understand the full scope of included services before enrollment, and confirm whether the company is FCRA-compliant and properly licensed for credit repair in Florida.
pros: Offers multiple tiered plans ($29.90–$39.90/month) with options for 7-day trials at $1.00, allowing low-risk entry
Bundles credit repair with business consulting, funding assistance, and bookkeeping—beneficial for entrepreneurs addressing multiple needs simultaneously
Customer testimonial reports 120-point credit score improvement within months and $45k in business funding secured
Includes educational components and one-on-one support in higher tiers (Elite plan advertises priority processing and one-on-one support)
Provides periodic reviews, actionable advice, and personalized recommendations tailored to client goals
Multilingual website support (EN, ES, FR) and free initial consultation option
Addresses both personal credit repair and business formation/growth in single engagement
cons: No published success rates, average credit score improvements, or dispute resolution statistics provided
Minimal disclosure of dispute methodology, FCRA compliance practices, or practitioner credentials and licensing
Subscription model with ongoing monthly charges creates recurring cost without guaranteed outcome; no flat-fee or performance-based option disclosed
Website lacks regulatory disclosures, business registration details, or physical office address beyond 'Miami, Florida'
Customer testimonials are attributed only to first names and initials—not independently verifiable; no third-party reviews or ratings visible
best_for: Entrepreneurs and small business owners who need both credit repair and business consulting simultaneously
Individuals seeking educational guidance alongside dispute services rather than fully managed credit repair
Clients willing to commit to subscription-based ongoing programs with trial entry points
diagnosis: DEH Consulting Services is best suited for entrepreneurs and small business owners addressing multiple financial needs (credit repair + business growth) through a single provider, or individuals who value ongoing educational support alongside dispute work. The primary caveat is lack of transparency regarding credentials, compliance certifications, dispute methodology, and independently verifiable success rates—prospective clients should request detailed disclosures and verify licensing before enrollment.
services: Growth Credit Repair Plan ($29.90/month with 7-day $1 trial)
Advanced Credit Repair Plan ($29.90/month, no trial)
Premium Credit Repair Plan ($39.90/month with 7-day $1 trial)
Elite Credit Repair Plan ($39.90/month, no trial, includes priority processing and one-on-one support)
Credit dispute handling and negative item removal
